title: 系统托盘菜单完善
summary: After fixes, Task 1 (AC1) is now properly implemented with all required menu items. The capture_toggle handler now correctly calls start/stop_auto_capture using tauri::async_runtime::spawn. Remaining issues: AC3 (图标状态) and AC4 (工具提示) are not implemented but these are separate tasks. The core menu functionality is complete.

issues.description: AC3 (图标状态) is not implemented - spec requires icon to show activity status, but implementation shows indicator only in menu text, not on the tray icon itself. This may be a separate task.
AC4 (工具提示) is not implemented - spec requires tooltip showing '当前状态（捕获中/已暂停）、今日记录数'. This may be a separate task.
Task breakdown could be clearer. The spec shows Task 1 implements AC1, but AC2 (状态切换) is actually partially implemented by Task 1's capture_toggle handler.

strengths: Good test coverage for is_auto_capture_running() and get_auto_capture_status() functions
Menu rebuild on right-click correctly implemented to show updated status
Status indicator (●/○) in menu text provides clear visual feedback
capture_toggle now correctly uses tauri::async_runtime::spawn for async operations
Event emissions added for frontend integration (tray-menu-update, tray-generate-summary, tray-open-settings)
All required menu items now present: 启动/停止捕获, 生成日报, 设置, 显示窗口, 退出
